title: Magnets
label: Magnet
section_copy: Prague and Czech-theme magnets arranged for souvenir retail, museum shops, and visitor stores that want gift-ready designs instead of generic tourist clutter.
page_intro: A flexible magnet range for Prague and Czech souvenir merchandising. Suitable for low-MOQ testing, mixed display racks, and category expansion after initial sell-through.
default_note: Suitable for souvenir shops, museum shops, visitor stores, and low-MOQ product testing.

products.name: Prague Tram Collage Magnet
